headline: Should You Hold or Sell HOLX Stock as It Nears the End of Public Phase?
summary: Hologic nears its $76 buyout price as Diagnostics faces headwinds, tariffs hurt, and the stock trades at a sector premium.

headline: GE HealthCare completes Intelerad acquisition – accelerating shift to cloud-first enterprise solutions to deliver precision care
summary: CHICAGO, March 18, 2026--GE HealthCare today announced that it has completed the acquisition of Intelerad, a leading medical imaging software provider for the healthcare industry, for a base purchase price of $2.3 billion in cash (subject to customary adjustments). Intelerad’s technology and customer base will extend GE HealthCare’s reach into high-growth specialized clinics and ambulatory care environments, complementing the company’s strength in hospital-based imaging.
